mapper.sql: id, push_type, title, content, content_type, media_id, page, target_type, target_group_id, target_tag_id, total_count, success_count, fail_count, scheduled_at, sent_at, status, error_msg, add_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from litemall_push_log
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into litemall_push_log (push_type, title, content, target_type, target_group_id, target_tag_id, total_count, success_count, fail_count, scheduled_at, sent_at, status, error_msg, add_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{pushType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetGroupId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{targetTagId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{successCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{failCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{scheduledAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sentAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT})

insert into litemall_push_log
push_type, title, content, content_type, media_id, page, target_type, target_group_id, target_tag_id, total_count, success_count, fail_count, scheduled_at, sent_at, status, error_msg, add_time, update_time, deleted,
#{pushType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contentType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mediaId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{page,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetGroupId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{targetTagId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{successCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{failCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{scheduledAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sentAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update: update litemall_push_log set push_type = #{pushType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_type = #{targetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_group_id = #{targetGroupId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, target_tag_id = #{targetTagId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total_count = #{totalCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, success_count = #{successCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, fail_count = #{failCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, scheduled_at = #{scheduledAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, sent_at = #{sentAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, add_time = #{addTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
update litemall_push_log set deleted = 1 where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
